Demand for humanoid robots across the UAE and GCC is growing faster than the market can supply. Businesses in events, hospitality, entertainment, and corporate services are fielding client requests for robotics-driven experiences, and most of them do not yet have a structured way to deliver.

The Mangobot [Channel Partner Program](/partnerships) is a structured way for businesses to offer humanoid robotics to their clients. It changes that. It gives businesses direct access to our full portfolio of advanced robots, our operational infrastructure, and our team, so they can offer humanoid robotics to their clients without owning or managing the technology themselves.


## Our Partnership Models

### Option 1: Direct Asset Ownership (Our Most Popular)

Partners purchase robots outright. Mangobot provides ongoing operational support and technical infrastructure. No monthly rental cost, maximum margin on every deployment, and the highest long-term return for partners building a serious robotics business.

### Option 2: Profit Sharing

The simplest entry point. Mangobot supplies the robot, training, marketing materials, and an on-site technician. The partner manages the client relationship and execution. Revenue is split equally, with no upfront investment required.

### Option 3: Monthly Rental

Partners rent robots on a monthly basis and deploy at their own margin. With a consistent event calendar, break-even comes within days, with strong profit on every deployment thereafter.

**Explore the partnership models in full [here](/partnerships)**


## What Every Partner Receives

Across all three models, partners receive access to Mangobot's full robot portfolio, professional operations training, a dedicated on-site Mangobot technician per deployment, robot transport to the partner's location, and complete marketing and sales materials.

Partners also benefit from Mangobot's brand credibility as the UAE's dedicated humanoid robotics operator. In a market where clients are still learning who to trust, that association carries real commercial value.

## Who the Programme Is For

The programme is designed for businesses that already hold client relationships in event management, hospitality, corporate services, entertainment, or experiential marketing.

If your clients host conferences, product launches, exhibitions, brand activations, or high-profile events, you are already positioned to offer Mangobot's humanoids as part of your service. No technical background required.

## The Market Opportunity

The GCC is at an inflection point for humanoid robotics. Government investment in AI and smart infrastructure is accelerating. Client appetite for technology-driven experiences is at an all-time high. And the supply of credible, operationally capable robotics partners in the region remains limited.


## Get Started

Find out which model fits your business. Explore the Channel Partner Programme at [mangobot.com/partnerships](/partnerships), or reach out to our team [directly](/partnerships#contact-form).
